original_text: Institutional investor activity reflects mixed sentiment following the earnings release. Ark Invest purchased $21.5 million in Airbnb stock, viewing the post-earnings decline as a buying opportunity (C018). Baron Capital also disclosed Q2 positions involving Airbnb alongside other real estate holdings (C016). The stock underperformed the broader market on August 11, 2025, despite the earnings beat (C003, C005). Management's balance sheet remains solid with a current ratio of 1.23 as of Q2 2025, indicating adequate liquidity to fund strategic initiatives (K006).

changes_summary: Corrected citation mismatches identified by the fact-checker: updated Ark Invest citation from C018 to C089, Baron Capital citation from C016 to C087, and stock performance/earnings beat citations from C003/C005 to C074/C076 to align with the verified evidence chunks.
